ref: Jesus asked, “When the owner of that vineyard comes, what do you suppose he will do to those renters?”

translated: "Why do you call me good? No one is good except God alone," Jesus said. "You are the Christ, the Son of the living God," he replied.

translated: Hey, Jesus of Nazareth, what are you saying? He did not come to eat food. But he said he came to heal the sick. He is the Lord Koosa.
